run_policy.notes: Sequential targeted run from manual normalized package.

steps.instruction: Open login page, enter active user email and password, submit.
steps.actual_result: Dashboard heading and user menu were visible.

retries.reason: Temporary timeout waiting for dashboard route.
retries.outcome: Second attempt passed; recorded as technical flake.

automation_update_signal.reason: First attempt timed out, second attempt passed without product assertion change.

results.expected_result: Generic invalid credential message is shown.

steps.instruction: Open login page, enter active user email and invalid password, submit.
steps.expected_result: Generic invalid credential message is shown.

assertions.assertion: Invalid password must not authenticate user.

ui.observation: Dashboard route loaded after invalid password submit.

issue_candidate.title: Invalid password allows dashboard access
issue_candidate.summary: Invalid password returned dashboard access instead of the expected generic credential error.
reproduction_steps: Enter active user email and invalid password.
issue_candidate.expected_result: Generic invalid credential message is shown.

automation_update_signal.reason: Automation should assert rejection path without weakening business assertion.

results.notes: Business assertion failure, no retry performed.

results.expected_result: Product exists in DB and appears in product list.
results.actual_result: Could not verify DB persistence because read-only DB credentials were unavailable.

steps.instruction: Create product by API, verify product row exists in DB, view product in UI.
steps.expected_result: Product exists in DB and appears in product list.
steps.actual_result: API create was available, but DB verification could not start due missing read-only credential.

blocker.blocker_reason: Approved read-only DB credential was not available in the execution environment.

api.redacted_curl: curl -X POST 'https://staging.example.com/api/products' -H 'Authorization: Bearer <REDACTED>' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"sku":"SKU-EXEC-001","name":"Executor Example Product"}'

db.actual: not run because DB credential unavailable

evidence_gaps: Read-only DB credential unavailable; DB assertion not executed.

issue_candidate.title: Product persistence test blocked by missing DB credential
issue_candidate.summary: DB verification could not run because approved read-only DB credential was unavailable.
reproduction_steps: Create product through the product API.
Attempt read-only DB verification for SKU SKU-EXEC-001.
issue_candidate.expected_result: Product exists in DB and appears in product list.
issue_candidate.actual_result: DB verification could not start due missing read-only credential.

automation_update_signal.reason: Automation cannot validate DB persistence until read-only credential source is configured.

results.notes: Blocked by credential gap, not a product assertion failure.
